Prevent emoji and unsupported character errors


Key details
Description

Description - Issues related to prevent emoji and unsupported character


Issue 1 - Only one error message in add-exporter-details for emoji


Steps to Reproduce:

Start creating CC

navigate to add-exporter-details

Enter emojis in Full name of responsible person and Company name field

Expected Result:
the field show display 2 error messages for each field

Actual Result:
only 1 error message is displayed

image-20260420-132607.png
 

Issue 2- No error message for Country field in /what-exporters-address page

Steps to Reproduce:

Start creating CC

navigate to /what-exporters-address page

Enter emojis in all the fields

Expected Result:
error message should display for all the fields

Actual Result:
no error message for Country field


image-20260420-132945.png
 

Issue 3- No error message for destination country when both the fields i.e, Select the destination country and point of destination are filled with emoji

Steps to Reproduce:

Start creating CC

navigate to what-export-journey page

Enter emojis in both the fields

Expected Result:
error message should display for all the fields

Actual Result:
no error message for Select the destination country


image-20260420-133309.png

Issue 4- Different error message for Vessel name for direct landing

Steps to Reproduce:

Start creating CC with direct landing

navigate to /direct-landing

Enter emojis in Vessel name or port letter and number (PLN)

Expected Result:
error message should match for error summary and field level

Actual Result:
different error messages in field level and summary level 


image-20260420-133709.png
image-20260420-133720.png
Issue 5- Incorrect error message for flight number

Steps to Reproduce:

Start creating CC with manual landing

navigate to add-transportation-details-plane

Enter 8 or more emojis in Flight number

Expected Result:
error message should be Please only use letters and numbers

Actual Result:
error message is Flight number must not exceed 15 characters even when only 8 emojis are entered


image-20260420-134234.png
 

Issue 6- No error message for flag state, field is accepting emoji input

Steps to Reproduce:

Start creating CC with manual landing

navigate to add-transportation-details-container-vessel

Enter emojis in Flag state field

Expected Result:
error message should display Please only use letters and numbers

Actual Result:
no error message, user is able to complete the CC

reference: https://eaflood.atlassian.net/browse/FI0-11205
